title: Who Is William Neil McCasland? Silver Alert Issued For Retired US Air Force General Linked To UFO Research
description: A Silver Alert has been issued in New Mexico for William Neil McCasland, a retired US Air Force major general and former commander of key research units.

title: William McCasland Retired General Behind Air Force Research Laboratory UFO Projects Missing—Silver Alert Issued
description: Retired US General William McCasland, known for his work in aerospace research, has gone missing in New Mexico, prompting a Silver Alert and widespread concern.

title: Nevada has highest rate of UAP sightings in country since 2023, report says
description: Nevada has the highest rate of unidentified aerial phenomenon per capita out of any state since 2023, according to a new report.

title: Nevada has highest rate of UAP sightings in country since 2023, report says
description: Enigma Labs, a technology company which tracks unidentified aerial phenomenon, said on a per capita basis, Nevada has the highest level of reports that they could verify

title: "I definitely saw an unidentified flying object that night." Why this heavy metal icon is convinced he saw a UFO one fateful night in North Carolina
description: The truth is out there for Lamb Of God's Randy Blythe
